title: MinecraftPlus
description: A Datapack focused on adding more mobs, minibosses, and structures to enhance the vanilla Minecraft experience.
body:
![MinecraftPlus Datapack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd31a67c577c882136cfb861adf16e8d9753a090.png) # Expanding the vanilla experience MinecraftPlus is a data pack designed to enhance the Minecraft experience by introducing new content such as new mobs, mini bosses, structures and much more. ## Features ### 6 New Mobs ![Alligator Mob MinecraftPlus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be3bbab0df1e85b48c26eca864ca1895299773b8.png) ![Crab Mob MinecraftPlus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b02723cd8233813100c87a07c4a6f6c55e3f0121.png) ![Hedgehog Mob MinecraftPlus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b0598590832c4712865d4cad077b91134b6a1dd.png) ![Kiwi Bird Mob MinecraftPlus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0a4a19728feac34bfed27f8346801cf8e70401c.png) ![Mouse Mob MinecraftPlus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5487f239466c2969dc9ffc720079daf4d914e672.png) ![Raccoon Mob MinecraftPlus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8308984967de87f549edc5325c642973d91fdb4.png) ### 3 New Minibosses
Spoiler (Images of Minibosses) ![Illusioner Miniboss MinecraftPlus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43abbed01833b9376973eeb60d4df7f956fcc80e.png) ![Labyrinth Keeper Miniboss MinecraftPlus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1203b075dc9365a10a84393c53c794a04106d4b5.png) ![Sorcerer Miniboss MinecraftPlus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/993ecdd5ac61b7934736cc62360bfcd5b6d64067.png)
### 3 New Structures - Jungle Labyrinth - Ruined Well - Woodland Ruins ### New Items and Weapons - Halberds - Iron and Gold Strengthened Bows - Ice Cream - Sandwiches\ +Many more ### New Custom Enchantments - Whirlwind\ +Many More ### New Advancements - Brings back some old Minecraft advancements - Adds new advancements relating to the new content ## Supported Languages ### DISCLAMIER These translations may not be accurate and were included to make the datapack as accessible as possible. Please report any wrong translations [here](https://github.com/FlamingTaco113/minecraftplus-datapack/issues) - English (US) - English (CAN) - European Spanish - European French

## For more information, check out the wiki [here](https://github.com/FlamingTaco113/MinecraftPlus-Datapack/wiki)!
